name: Junot Díaz

acts.description: Multiple women accused him of forceful kissing, verbal abuse, and misogynist behavior at literary events

behavior_summary: Multiple women in literary circles accused him of forceful kissing without consent and sustained verbal abuse. He acknowledged some behaviors in an essay that framed them as trauma responses.

notable_works: The Brief Wondrous Life of Oscar Wao
This Is How You Lose Her
art.summary: Pulitzer-winning novelist who transformed the literary depiction of the Dominican diaspora. His prose is genuinely dazzling.

verdict.blurb: Wrote one of the great American novels and spent years in literary spaces behaving badly toward women who were trying to get his attention as a writer. The talent is real; so is the pattern.
